found.quote: Vendor may study service records, build trend reports, tune automated systems, create commercial benchmarks, and enhance offerings for accounts other than Customer.

Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 10 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.
will not be required to provide written completion evidence.
Vendor may move hosted records among facilities and affiliates in the United States, Canada, Ireland, India, and Singapore without standard contractual clauses or transfer impact documentation.
